THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE OF ITS INSURED, HEATHER REYNOLDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, JESSICA $2,733.08 PRINCIPAL, $363.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,096.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, JESSICA JACKSON'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 706.051(B).) $50.00 PER PAY PERIOD SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM DEFENDANT'S WAGES. DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED THAT THE REST OF HER INCOME IS NECESSARY FOR HER SUPPORT. (THE COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AND SERVE IT ON ALL PARTIES.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aaron Dawson, Esq. of Alecto Law, Tel. 415.534.5346, appearing specially for plaintiff;
Jessica Jackson, Tel. 650.758.8152, judgment debtor/claimant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel did not give proper notice that he is contesting the tentative ruling. The matter was discussed and the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: JESSICA JACKSON's CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. (CCP sec. 706.051(b).) $50.00 per pay period shall be withheld from Defendant's wages. Defendant has established that the rest of her income is necessary for her support. (The court shall prepare the order and serve it on all parties.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976
